blockedAssertions.blockedBy: `bash scripts/deploy-testnet.sh --profile default` exited with code 1 while extracting deployer address; local Aptos profile config is missing (`Unable to find config .../.aptos/config.yaml, have you run aptos init?`).

appliedUpdates.description: Added aptos-cli concurrency cap, flow validator isolation guidance, and testnet profile prerequisite note for deployment validation.

frictions.description: `scripts/deploy-testnet.sh` exits immediately at profile extraction when no local Aptos config exists, so the script does not print its own friendly error block.
frictions.resolution: Captured the direct Aptos CLI profile error via `aptos config show-profiles --profile default` and used that as blocker evidence for VAL-CONTRACT-001.

blockers.description: Missing Aptos profile config in repo workspace prevented testnet deploy evidence collection.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried deployment command and ran `aptos config show-profiles --profile default`; CLI returned `Unable to find config /Users/maxmohammadi/cash-orderbook/.aptos/config.yaml, have you run aptos init?`.
